paragraphs: In the Options dialog you can enter the alignment settings for controls within a panel:
Move the control on the panel pixel-by-pixel
Move the control along the snaplines
Increase or decrease the height of the control pixel-by-pixel
Increase or decrease the width of the control pixel-by-pixel
Increase or decrease the height of the control to the next snapline
Increase or decrease the width of the control to the next snapline
Use the mouse to deactivate snaplines when moving the control
(the insert symbol appears at the cursor ),
tables: Functional description
Key combination
Move the control on the panel pixel-by-pixel
Move the control along the snaplines
Increase or decrease the height of the control pixel-by-pixel
<Shift>+<> or <Shift>+<>
Increase or decrease the width of the control pixel-by-pixel
<Shift>+<> or <Shift>+<>
Increase or decrease the height of the control to the next snapline
<Shift>+<Ctrl>+<> or <Shift>+<Ctrl>+<>
Increase or decrease the width of the control to the next snapline
<Shift>+<Control>+<> or <Shift>+<Control>+<>
Use the mouse to deactivate snaplines when moving the control
<Alt>+mouse movement
Copy controls
Select the controls, press <Ctrl> and use the mouse to drag to the required position (the insert symbol appears at the cursor ), release the mouse button, release <Ctrl>.
Proportionally change the size. Available for: New Panel LED Control Picture Box Switch/Indicator
Select the controls, press <Shift> and change the size using the mouse on the mark frame. This function is not available for dragging on corners.
